serviceDescription: A public map service displaying the extent of existing Terrestrial Ecological Unit inventory (TEUI) data to facilitate inter-agency collaboration. The feature class for this dataset will display polygons of the ecological unit plots, acreages, and percent coverages of National Forest and Grassland administrative boundaries using their common names, with a percent coverage for Land Type and acres of forest per plot. TEUI Status Metadata
